description: Two lines from a letter in Hebrew. Wide space between the lines. Dating: may be late 11th or early 12th century based on similar format to other letters from that time period. Mentions: "...to the land of Canaan if he has a need and a necessity..." (אם יש לו צורך וחשחן); sending something or someone quickly to be diligent in the service of a dignitary; and "I heard that in the city of [...]."
